description: Freight pricing policy for tier classification and rate calculation effective from 2026-01-01 to 2026-12-31.

rules.description: Assign Tier A (Premium) for shipments with weight > 1.0 kg and distance > 500 km. Apply premium surcharge.

action.description: Assign Tier A and calculate final amount using premium surcharge formula: base_rate = 5.50 + (fuel_index - 4.00) * 0.30; final_amount = base_rate * distance * weight

rules.description: Assign Tier B (Standard Heavy) for shipments with weight > 0.5 kg and distance > 300 km. Apply standard fuel surcharge.

action.description: Assign Tier B and calculate final amount using standard fuel surcharge formula: base_rate = 4.10 + (fuel_index - 4.10) * 0.22; final_amount = base_rate * distance * weight

rules.description: Assign Tier C (Economy) for shipments with weight <= 0.5 kg or distance <= 300 km. Apply economy rate.

action.description: Assign Tier C and calculate final amount using economy rate formula: base_rate = 2.80; final_amount = base_rate * distance * weight

default_action.description: Default fallback tier as per Section 3.3 - Economy Freight Schedule
